description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has two jobs: check and gpu. The check job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, macos-latest, and windows-latest, checking out the repository, setting up R, and running various R scripts to install dependencies, build and check a package. The gpu job runs on a self-hosted runner, only on non-pull request events, building a Docker image and running checks with GPUs.
